parametrized_description: Both subsoil and topsoil need to be added to a garden bed. The objective is to minimize the total amount of water required to hydrate the garden bed, where each bag of subsoil requires A units of water per day and each bag of topsoil requires B units of water per day. The total number of bags of subsoil and topsoil combined must not exceed C. Additionally, at least D bags of topsoil must be used, and the proportion of topsoil bags must not exceed E of all bags.

B.description: Quantity of water needed daily to moisten a single bag of topsoil

E.description: Highest percentage of bags that can contain topsoil

C.description: Highest quantity of combined topsoil and subsoil bags

D.description: Least amount of bags of topsoil to be utilized

A.description: Quantity of water needed daily to moisten a single bag of subsoil

slack_2.description: Slack variable for constraint: The number of bags containing topsoil should not surpass E in relation to the total bag count.

slack_0.description: Slack variable for constraint: The combined quantity of subsoil and topsoil bags should not surpass C.

slack_1.description: Slack variable for constraint: A minimum of D bags of topsoil is required to be utilized.

b.description: The quantity of bags containing topsoil

constraints.description: The combined quantity of subsoil and topsoil bags should not surpass C. (Modified to include slack variable slack_0)
The number of bags containing topsoil should not surpass E in relation to the total bag count. (Modified to include slack variable slack_2)
A minimum of D bags of topsoil is required to be utilized. (Modified to include slack variable slack_1)

objective.description: The goal is to lessen the overall amount of water needed, which is calculated by adding (A times the quantity of subsoil bags) to (B times the quantity of topsoil bags).
